note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.structure module functions.

method_groups.grout: grout_cohesion, grout_confining, grout_dir, grout_disp, grout_friction, grout_perimeter, grout_slip, grout_stiffness, grout_stress, set_grout_cohesion, set_grout_friction, set_grout_perimeter, set_grout_stiffness

methods.name: area
methods.description: Get the cross-section area of the cable element.

methods.name: component_id
methods.description: Get the Cable component id.

methods.name: connectivity
methods.description: Get the index of the node with component-ID id in the element. A ValueError exception is raised if no node in that element matches.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Delete this structural element.

methods.name: density
methods.description: Get the density of this structural element.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the Cable extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: force_axial
methods.description: Get the average axial force of the element (positive: tension; negative: compression).

methods.name: force_nodal
methods.description: Get the generalized nodal force acting at each end. The translational and rotational components of node 1 are given first.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the Cable group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: cable.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the Cable. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this Cable is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: grout_cohesion
methods.description: Get the grout cohesion.

methods.name: grout_confining
methods.description: Get the confining stress acting on the grout at each end. Negative value indicates compression. The stress acts in a plane perpendicular to the cable axis; effective confining stress is the average of the principal values in this plane.

methods.name: grout_dir
methods.description: Get the direction vector in which cable is being loaded by the coupling spring for each end.

methods.name: grout_disp
methods.description: Get displacement in grout (shear coupling spring) at each end ; positive/negative with respect to the average axial direction of cable.

methods.name: grout_friction
methods.description: Get the grout internal friction angle.

methods.name: grout_perimeter
methods.description: Get the grout exposed perimeter.

methods.name: grout_slip
methods.description: Get the slip state of grout (shear coupling spring) at each end. Return value {0, 1, 2} denotes never slipped, now slipping, or slipped in the past, respectively.

methods.name: grout_stiffness
methods.description: Get the grout stiffness.

methods.name: grout_stress
methods.description: Get stress in grout (shear coupling spring) at each end; positive/negative with respect to average axial direction of cable.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the Cable structural element id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: cable.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the Cable is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: length
methods.description: Get the length of the cable element.

methods.name: local_system
methods.description: Get local coordinate system of this element as a 3x3 tensor.

methods.name: mark
methods.description: Get the mark flag on the structural element. The structural element logic may modify this flag during command processing and cycling.

methods.name: nodes
methods.signature: cable.nodes() -> tuple of Structural element node objects
methods.description: Get a tuple containing the structural element nodes attached to this elemment.

returns.type: tuple of Structural element node objects

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the position vector of the element, defined as the element centroid.

methods.name: set_area
methods.description: Set the cross-section area of the cable element.

methods.name: set_density
methods.description: Set the density of this structural element.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.description: Set the Cable extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: cable.set_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> None
methods.description: Set the Cable group name in a given slot.

methods.name: set_grout_cohesion
methods.description: Set the grout cohesion.

methods.name: set_grout_friction
methods.description: Set the grout internal friction angle.

methods.name: set_grout_perimeter
methods.description: Set the grout exposed perimeter.

methods.name: set_grout_stiffness
methods.description: Set the grout stiffness.

methods.name: set_mark
methods.description: Set the mark flag on the structural element. The structural element logic may modify this flag during command processing and cycling.

methods.name: set_slide
methods.description: Set the boolean flag of the large-strain sliding. If True, slide is on; if False, slide is off.

methods.name: set_slide_tol
methods.description: Set the large-strain sliding tolerance of the cable element.

methods.name: set_thermal_expansion
methods.description: Set the thermal-expansion coefficient for the structural element.

methods.name: set_yield_compression
methods.description: Set the compression yield strength of the cable element.

methods.name: set_yield_tension
methods.description: Set the tension yield strength of the cable element.

methods.name: set_young
methods.description: Set the Youngs modulus of the cable element.

methods.name: slide
methods.description: Get the boolean flag of the large-strain sliding. If True, slide is on; if False, slide is off.

methods.name: slide_tol
methods.description: Get the large-strain sliding tolerance of the cable element.

methods.name: state_compression
methods.description: Get the compression yield state of the cable element. The return value {0, 1, 2} denotes never yielded, now yielding, or yielded in the past, respectively.

methods.name: state_tension
methods.description: Get the tension yield state of cable element. The return value {0, 1, 2} denotes never yielded, now yielding, or yielded in the past, respectively.

methods.name: stress_axial
methods.description: Get the average axial stress of the cable element (positive: tension; negative: compression.

methods.name: thermal_expansion
methods.description: Get the thermal-expansion coefficient for the structural element.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this Cable is live.

methods.name: volume
methods.description: Get the cable element volume, or the cross-sectional area times the length.

methods.name: yield_compression
methods.description: Get the compression yield strength of the cable element.

methods.name: yield_tension
methods.description: Get the tension yield strength of the cable element.

methods.name: young
methods.description: Get the Youngs modulus of the cable element.
